title: rhamnus oleoides subsp. graeca
intro: Rhamnus oleoides subsp. graeca, also known as the Greek buckthorn, is a plant species belonging to the family Rhamnaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with the Greek buckthorn include the potential treatment of various ailments such as digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
